zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Spencer of Hodnell於1435年出生在英國瓦維其可爾霍德爾時，他的父親Henry Spencer28歲，母親Isabelle Lincoln24歲。他於大約1460年與Anne Empson結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1497年1月4日在他的家鄉享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Spencer of Hodnell于1435年出生在英国瓦維其可爾霍德爾时，他的父亲Henry Spencer28岁，母亲Isabelle Lincoln24岁。他于大约1460年与Anne Empson结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1497年1月4日在他的家乡享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Spencer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): occupational name for someone who dispensed provisions or money, from Middle English spenser(e), spencer(e) ‘household steward, butler, almoner’ (Anglo-Norman French espenser, Old French despensier). Compare Spence and Spender . There is some dispute about the origins of the Spencer family, whose most famous member in recent times was the late Princess of Wales, born Lady Diana Spencer (1961–97). Some sources say that they are descended from William the Conqueror's steward, Robert Despencer. What is clear is that by the 15th century they had become prosperous from sheep farming in Northamptonshire. Robert Spencer (died 1627) was said to be the wealthiest man in England. Their titles have included Earls of Sunderland and Earls Spencer; and through the female line the 5th Earl of Sunderland also became Duke of Marlborough in 1733. This connection was the result of the marriage, in 1700, of the 3rd Duke of Sunderland to the daughter of John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough. The youngest son of this union, John Spencer (1708–46), was the father of the 1st Earl Spencer (1734–83).

variants.name: Spence
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a servant employed in the pantry of a great house or monastery, from Middle English spense, spence ‘pantry, larder, storeroom’ (Old French despense, from a Late Latin derivative of dispendere, past participle dispensus ‘to weigh out or dispense’). Compare Spencer .

variants.name: Spender
meanings: occupational name or status name from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘steward, treasurer’, a shortened form of Middle English, Old French despendour, denoting someone who managed money or supplies. Compare Spencer .
alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘spender (of money), spendthrift’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Spencer of Hodnell was born in 1435, in Hodnell, Warwickshire, England, his father, Henry Spencer, was 28 and his mother, Isabelle Lincoln, was 24. He married Anne Empson about 1460. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 4 January 1497, in his hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Spencer of Hodnell est né en 1435, à Hodnell, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Spencer, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabelle Lincoln, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Anne Empson environ 1460. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 janvier 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Spencer of Hodnell 1435 in Hodnell, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Spencer 28 und seine Mutter Isabelle Lincoln 24. Er hat um 1460 Anne Empson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Januar 1497 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Spencer of Hodnell è nato il nel 1435 nel Hodnell, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Spencer, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle Lincoln, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Anne Empson circa 1460. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 4 gennaio 1497, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Spencer of Hodnellが1435年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアホードネルで生まれた時，父Henry Spencerは28歳，母Isabelle Lincolnは24歳であった。約1460年にAnne Empsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1497年1月4日に故郷で62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Spencer of Hodnell(이)가 1435년 영국 워윅실르 호드넬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Spencer(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle Lincoln(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1460년 Anne Empson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 1월 4일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Spencer of Hodnell nasceu em 1435, em Hodnell, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Spencer, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle Lincoln, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Empson aproximadamente 1460. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1497, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Spencer of Hodnell родился в 1435 г. в местности ходнелл, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Spencer было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle Lincoln, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Empson около 1460 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 4 января 1497 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Spencer of Hodnell nació en 1435, en Hodnell, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Spencer, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Isabelle Lincoln, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Anne Empson aproximadamente 1460. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 4 de enero de 1497, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años.
